title: Cognitive Policy (Parsed)
description: Structured representation of a Cognitive Policy Markdown file after parsing. Stored as JSONB in cognitive_policies.policy_parsed. The raw Markdown source is preserved in cognitive_policies.policy_md.

allowed_topics.description: Bullet list from the '## allowed_topics' section. The agent may only respond within these topics. If non-empty, responses outside this set trigger topic_boundary_breach.

restricted_topics.description: Bullet list from the '## restricted_topics' section. The agent must never respond about these topics regardless of allowed_topics. May be empty. Responses touching any restricted topic trigger topic_boundary_breach.

restricted_actions.description: Bullet list from the '## restricted_actions' section. The agent must never execute these actions.

hitl_triggers.description: Bullet list from the '## HITL_triggers' section. These actions require explicit human approval before execution.

data_classification.description: Bullet list from the '## data_classification' section. Fields/data types and their sensitivity levels.

rate_limits.description: Bullet list from the '## rate_limits' section. Per-operation rate constraints.
